Using selectFrom(CRAWLERS) fetches all columns from the CRAWLERS table into a record. Consider selecting only the specific columns required, such as dsl.select(CRAWLERS.ID, CRAWLERS.NAME, CRAWLERS.LAST_RESULT).from(CRAWLERS).
